calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Off Calendar

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-16-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Steven A. Fabbro, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Ho Nui Tang Lee, who was placed under oath and examined.
Victoria Poon was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
Jonathan H. Erb, Esq. appeared for defendant David Vuong, who was not present at today's hearing.
Award of Arbitrator was filed August 18, 2009.
Plaintiff's request for Trial De Novo was filed August 25, 2009
Notice of Time and Place of Trial After Trial De Novo Request was filed September 3, 2009
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 4, 2010.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Fabbro. In accordance with the terms of the settlement, defendant David Vuong shall pay plaintiff Ho Nui Tang Lee the sum of $2,000.00. Payment by defendant David Voung shall occur after plaintiff Ho Nui Tang Lee provides defendant with proof of the release of any outstanding liens. Upon payment of the afore-mentioned $2,000.00, plaintiff will dismiss this matter with prejudice, with each party to bear their own attorney fees and costs. General Release pursuant to Civil Code Section 1542 applies. Mr. Erb shall reduce the terms of this agreement into writing.

Plaintiff Ho Nui Tang Lee was placed under oath and voir dired by the Court as to the terms and her understanding of the agreement.

Matter is continued to March 16, 2010 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calender.

Agreement of the parties was accepted by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Off Calendar

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Off Calendar: Trial De Novo Filed

TDN SWEEP
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-04-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Production Of Documents By Deft David Vuong In Response To Pltf'S Request For Identification And Production Of Documents, Set No. One(10, Request For Sanctions,
Off Calendar Jul-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, (Late) tentative ruling is adopted.
1. Motion to compel further production of documents by defendant David Vuong In response to plaintiff's request for identification and production of documents, set no. one, granted in part, denied in part:
a. As to request for production no. 8, denied;
b. As to request for production no. 9, granted; within ten days of the date of notice of entry of this order, defendant shall serve a verified supplemental response to the subject request for production, and produce the pertinent document(s) for inspection and copying; (Late tentative).
c. Production of documents pursuant to this order shall be subject to the following protective order:
The disclosure of the described information shall be limited to plaintiff; plaintiff's counsel; and any employee of counsel and/or expert consulted or retained by counsel in connection with the subject claim. In the event that information is disclosed to any such employee, expert or consultant, those parties shall be informed of these restrictions, and provided with a copy of this order.
2. Request for sanctions denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
